data.title: BONK tanks 11% as exchange transfers overwhelm markets
data.description:
Solana-based memecoin Bonk Inu (BONK) tanked by 11% over a volatile 24-hour trading period, erasing earlier gains triggered by a major token burn announcement. The token’s price dropped from an intraday high of $0. 00003185 and $0. 00003763, ending the week trading in the red. BONK’s value had gone up against the backdrop of its team’s announcement […]

data.title: BlackRock’s Digital Asset Pioneer Leaves and Joins SharpLink as Co‑CEO: Is This Bullish for Ethereum
data.description:
BlackRock's Digital Asset Pioneer has officially departed from the company and taken on a new role as Co-CEO at SharpLink. This significant career move has sparked discussions within the financial and cryptocurrency communities, leading many to speculate about the potential implications for Ethereum. Observers are questioning whether this transition could be a bullish signal for Ethereum's future, given BlackRock's stature in the digital asset space and the innovative direction implied by SharpLink’s objectives. As the market reacts, industry analysts will be closely monitoring how this change might influence investments and developments within the Ethereum ecosystem.
source: https://blocknews.com/blackrocks-digital-asset-pioneer-leaves-and-joins-sharplink-as-co‑ceo-is-this-bullish-for-ethereum/

data.title:
THE BITCOIN CYCLE ISN'T OVER

Each Bitcoin cycle has lasted approximately 1,070 days from the bottom of the bear market to the bull market peak.

If this trend continues, the bull market is expected to last until October 20, 2025.

Will this time be different? 🤔

data.title: Asia-Pacific Companies and Local Governments Sell $1,500,000,000,000 in Bonds As Investors Flee US Dollar Assets: Report
data.description:
Companies and non-sovereign issuers in the Asia-Pacific region have been hawking bonds at a record rate as investors look to move away from US dollar assets, according to a new Bloomberg report. Non-sovereign issuers are non-federal bond issuers like local and regional governments and public agencies.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/07/25/asia-pacific-companies-and-local-governments-sell-1500000000000-in-bonds-as-investors-flee-us-dollar-assets-report/

data.title: Nasdaq-listed Wellgistics Health adopts XRP Ledger for real-time payments
data.description:

data.title: Japan and the US divided over how trade deal profits will be split
data.description:
The United States and Japan are at odds over how to divide profits from a newly signed trade and investment package announced last Tuesday. Both governments have agreed to a $550 billion economic framework involving tariffs and joint investments, but there’s a rift over how returns from the deal will be shared between the two […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/japan-and-the-us-divided-over-trade-profits/

data.title: Ethereum exit queue reaches all-time high in record validator withdrawal
data.description:

source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ethereum-exit-queue-reaches-all-time-high/

data.title: From Slump to Surge: NFT Market Climbs to $6.6 Billion with CryptoPunks Leading the Charge
data.description:
The NFT market capitalization soared to $6. 6 billion in July 2025—its highest point since early 2025—driven by renewed investor interest.

The post From Slump to Surge: NFT Market Climbs to $6. 6 Billion with CryptoPunks Leading the Charge first appeared on Ecoinimist.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2025/07/25/from-slump-to-surge-nft-market-to-6-6-b/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=from-slump-to-surge-nft-market-to-6-6-b
